nonblocking_recommendations: For even clearer diagnostics, consider setting non-null expected/observed values on planned-module missing preview errors, not only relying on the keys being present as null.
Consider adding a small regression assertion that every emitted error has exactly one corresponding error_details entry.

provided_validation_evidence: focused bundle tests: 13 passed, 21 subtests passed
full scripts pytest: 142 passed, 2 skipped, 138 subtests passed

safety_boundary_assessment.assessment: Changes remain offline/stdlib validation and tests only. Reviewed diff shows no scanner, network, callback, target-touching, module execution, findings/evidence/loot/report output, or scope/config changes. No scans or target-touching actions were run during this review.

architecture_fit.assessment: Implementation fits the existing bundle validator architecture: structured BundleErrorDetail is integrated through BundleConsistencyResult.add_error, as_dict now exposes error_details, JSON load failures flow through add_error, cross-document consistency checks preserve deny-by-default behavior, and module-id mismatch detection is generalized for one missing plus one extra input/result ID.

summary.what_i_found: The revised implementation addresses the prior blocker: error_details are created for add_error paths, expected/observed keys are always present in detail dictionaries, JSON load failures use add_error, mismatch/missing/extra diagnostics are structured, and added tests cover multimodule module_id mismatch plus missing/extra preview detail population.
